creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
running make readmes waits for CTRL-D when attempting to make readmes
in the editors directory.  Snippet from make output:

===>   Creating README.html for zziplib-0.10.11
===> editors
===>  Creating README.html
cd: can't cd to gnuserv-emacs20
cd: can't cd to gnuserv-emacs20

Then it sat there until I hit CTRL-D.

Fix: 

dunno.
How-To-Repeat: 	

cd /usr/ports; make readmes
